title: Social Security Act 2018 - New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand's principal legislation governing social security benefits and assistance programs. Establishes eligibility requirements, payment rates, and beneficiary obligations for jobseeker support, sole parent support, supported living payment, youth payments, emergency benefits, accommodation supplements, and various other social assistance programs administered by the Ministry of Social Development.
